future_work.pr_merge_order: PRs #25 and #29 both touch updateItem — merge in order: #25 (no-op) first, then #29 (ReturnValues ALL_NEW). PRs #33 supersedes #26 — merge #33, close #26.
future_work.type_improvement: batchGetItems return type is Array<T | undefined> but implementation never returns undefined — could narrow to Array<T>; deferred until PR backlog clears
future_work.gsi_key_projection: PERF OPPORTUNITY: GSI queries in getItems fetch ALL item attributes just to extract hash/range keys. Add key-only ProjectionExpression to the GSI query to reduce network traffic. FilterExpression still works (evaluated server-side before projection). Implement once PR backlog clears.
future_work.missing_features_noted: DynamoDbRepository lacks: scan, transactWrite/transactGet. JsonPointerRepository lacks: patchDocument (batch pointer updates). These are potential future features to implement after backlog clears.
